trust.title: Why Origin
trust.subtitle: We deliver transparent, compliant car leasing in Dubai.
trust.rtaDesc: Every vehicle is registered with Dubai's Roads & Transport Authority and regularly inspected.
trust.insuranceDesc: Full coverage included with every lease — no surprises.
trust.vatDesc: 5% VAT is always shown separately. No hidden charges, ever.
trust.supportDesc: Reach us anytime on WhatsApp or by phone.
trust.flexibleDesc: Choose from 1 to 24 months — short-term or long-term, your call.
trust.deliveryDesc: We deliver your vehicle anywhere in Dubai at no extra charge.
trust.includedDesc: Your monthly lease covers insurance, registration, and roadside assistance — so you only focus on driving.

about.title: About Origin
about.subtitle: Buy, rent or lease premium Chinese electric vehicles in Dubai.
about.value1Desc: No hidden fees. VAT always itemised separately.
about.value2Desc: Fully RTA-registered and compliant with UAE regulations.
about.missionText: To make premium Chinese electric vehicles accessible — whether you buy, rent, or lease — transparent and effortless for everyone in Dubai.
about.whyText: Chinese automotive brands have transformed the industry — advanced technology, modern design, and competitive pricing without compromise.
about.ctaSubtitle: Browse our fleet of premium Chinese vehicles and find your perfect lease today.

home.step1Desc: Explore our full fleet of premium Chinese electric vehicles. Filter by brand, category, or budget.
home.step2Desc: Pick your rental duration (1 to 24 months) and km package. Add optional insurance, additional driver, or GPS. See the all-in monthly rate with VAT.
home.step3Desc: We deliver to your door anywhere in Dubai — or collect from our showroom. Start driving the same day.

home.waSubtitle: We reply within minutes — in English, Arabic, or Chinese

rta.title: RTA Compliance
rta.fleet: All vehicles in our fleet are fully registered with the Roads and Transport Authority (RTA) of Dubai.
rta.licence: RTA Fleet Operator Licence: To be confirmed before launch.
rta.registration: Vehicle Registration: Every vehicle carries a valid RTA registration and is subject to annual inspection as required by Dubai law.
rta.insurance: Insurance Compliance: All vehicles are comprehensively insured in compliance with UAE Motor Vehicle Insurance requirements.
rta.driver: Driver Verification: We verify that all lessees hold a valid UAE or internationally recognised driving licence before handing over any vehicle.
rta.condition: Vehicle Condition: All vehicles are maintained to RTA roadworthiness standards and undergo pre-delivery inspection before each lease.
rta.contact: For enquiries about our regulatory status, contact us via WhatsApp or email at info@originleasing.ae.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how Origin Car Leasing LLC ("we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, and protects your personal data in accordance with UAE Federal Decree-Law No. 45 of 2021 on Personal Data Protection (PDPL).
privacy.dataCollect: Data We Collect: We collect information you provide when enquiring about or booking a vehicle, including your name, Emirates ID or passport number, UAE mobile number, and payment details.
privacy.dataUse: How We Use Your Data: Your data is used solely to process lease applications, communicate booking confirmations, send payment reminders, and comply with RTA and UAE FTA regulatory requirements.
privacy.retention: Data Retention: We retain your personal data for the duration of your lease and for 5 years thereafter as required by UAE commercial law.
privacy.rights: Your Rights: You have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your personal data. Contact us at info@originleasing.ae.
privacy.storage: Data Storage: All personal data is stored in UAE-region servers in compliance with UAE data residency requirements.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: These Terms & Conditions govern the lease of vehicles from Origin Car Leasing LLC ("the Company") to the lessee. By entering into a lease agreement, you agree to be bound by these terms.
terms.eligibility: Eligibility: Lessees must hold a valid UAE driving licence or an international driving licence recognised in the UAE. Minimum age is 21 years.
terms.insurance: Insurance: All vehicles are covered by comprehensive insurance. The lessee is responsible for any excess in the event of an at-fault accident.
terms.mileage: Mileage: Monthly mileage limits apply as specified in your lease agreement. Excess mileage is charged at the rate shown on your quote.
terms.vat: VAT: All lease payments are subject to 5% UAE Value Added Tax (VAT) in accordance with Federal Decree-Law No. 8 of 2017.
terms.termination: Termination: Early termination of a lease agreement may incur penalties as specified in your individual lease contract.
terms.governing: Governing Law: These terms are governed by the laws of the United Arab Emirates. Disputes shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the courts of Dubai.
